name: Marigold (Genda)
description: Bright orange and yellow flowers commonly used in Indian festivals and decorations. Very easy to grow.

name: Jasmine (Mogra)
description: Highly fragrant white flowers that bloom primarily in summer. Perfect for gardens and home balconies.

name: Lotus (Kamal)
description: The national flower of India. Requires a water garden or a large pot filled with water and clay soil.

name: Hibiscus (Gudhal)
description: Large, showy flowers available in many colors. Great for offering in prayers and highly medicinal.

name: Rose (Desi Gulab)
description: Classic Indian rose with intense fragrance, often used for making rose water (Gulab Jal).
soil_type: Loamy, well-drained soil rich in organic matter

name: Sunflower Seeds
description: High-yield sunflower seeds suitable for Indian summer climates. Packet contains approx 50 seeds.

name: Tulsi (Holy Basil) Seeds
description: Sacred and highly medicinal plant seeds. A must-have in every Indian household.

name: Premium Cocopeat (5kg Block)
description: Expands up to 25 liters. Excellent for seed germination, potting mixes, and retaining moisture.

name: Vermicompost (Organic Fertilizer) 2kg
description: 100% organic earthworm compost. Boosts plant growth and improves soil texture.

name: Neem Oil Spray (Pesticide) 250ml
description: Organic, cold-pressed Neem oil spray. Protects plants from aphids, mealybugs, and fungal diseases.

name: NPK 19:19:19 Water Soluble Fertilizer
description: Balanced chemical fertilizer for overall plant growth, root development, and better blooming.

name: Terracotta Clay Pot (10 inch)
description: Traditional Indian clay pot, highly porous, prevents root rot and allows roots to breathe.
